name: allincrypto 熬鹰资本 🇨🇳
fullText:
这个TAO，当时看到黄仁勋称赞这家公司以后没当回事，就老外那边两个大KOL喊了一下。
结果一路240拉到325，感觉还是要关注起来了，币圈每一轮新影响力人物都在变动，马斯克 特朗普 现在AI行业的迸发下黄仁勋也是超级领头羊，币圈是注意力经济，首富在哪目光就在哪钱就在哪，买了点儿TAO，长期关注。 https://t.co/pXCNSsGGEo

name: Solana
fullText:
Solana now supports the Machine Payments Protocol @mpp by @stripe and @tempo.

If you're building an API that needs to accept payments, @solana/mpp SDK handles any stablecoin on Solana (Spl, Token2022).

If you’re already building with MPP, Solana is now a supported payment rail. https://t.co/3kRFLOHebN
